description: You are the Water Quality Program Manager for the City of Millbrook Department of Public Utilities. The EPA requires submission of the annual Consumer Confidence Report (CCR) by July 1. You must compile this year's report from lab test results and draft narrative sections prepared by your engineering staff. On the Desktop you will find: lab_results_2025.odt (water quality test data for 8 regulated contaminants in pipe-delimited format), ccr_narrative_sections.odt (draft narrative text with inconsistent formatting and internal draft notes marked [REMOVE] that must be deleted), and epa_ccr_format_guide.txt (EPA formatting requirements). Create millbrook_ccr_2025.odt on the Desktop following the format guide: a centered cover page (utility name 18pt bold, report title 16pt, year 14pt), auto-generated Table of Contents, Heading 1 for each of the seven required sections (Source Water Information, Water Treatment Process, Detected Contaminants, Violations & Explanations, Health Information, How to Participate, Contact Information), a 7-column detected contaminants table with bold header row and the Lead violation row in bold italic, all [REMOVE] notes deleted, a footer with "City of Millbrook -- CCR 2025" and page numbers, 12pt serif justified body text, and 1-inch margins. Save as millbrook_ccr_2025.odt on the Desktop.

metadata.cover_title_line1: City of Millbrook Department of Public Utilities
